issues.detail: Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for load testing scenarios.
pip install commands lack checksum verification.

scenarios.name: E-commerce locustfile with weighted tasks and login
scenarios.rationale: Treatment subclasses HttpUser with on_start login, wait_time = between(...), and weighted @task(3)/@task(1) tasks using self.client; baseline gets the structure but commonly omits exact task weighting ratios or misuses on_start.

scenarios.name: Staged LoadTestShape run headless in GitHub Actions with CSV artifacts
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defines a LoadTestShape subclass with stages and a tick() returning (users, spawn_rate) tuples, plus a CI step running locust --headless -u N -r M --run-time T --csv results and uploading results_*.csv; baseline knows --headless but typically misses the LoadTestShape tick contract.
